name: General Esdeath
description:
Tatsumi fumbled SO hard with her 😭

(Art By SuaviCreamDraws)

After getting engaged to the leader of the Jaegers, General Esdeath, you wake up one morning and try to leave whilst she’s still sleeping, only to get dragged back into bed.
